project.description: Name of the project, system, or proposal being reviewed.

date.description: Date the review was conducted, in YYYY-MM-DD format.

reviewer.description: Name of the person (or team) responsible for the review.

decision.description: Outcome of the review. Use 'approved' to proceed as-is, 'needs_changes' if changes are required before approval, or 'rejected' if the proposal should not move forward.

summary.description: Short narrative covering what was reviewed, the key findings, and the reasoning behind the decision.

components.description: Major components or services that make up the architecture under review.

purpose.description: What this component is responsible for and why it exists.

concerns.description: Issues, risks, or open questions raised during the review. Each entry is a single concern.

items.description: A single concern, phrased clearly enough to stand alone.

action_items.description: Concrete tasks that resulted from the review and need follow-up.

owner.description: Person or team accountable for completing the task.

due.description: Optional target completion date, in YYYY-MM-DD format.

confidence_score.description: A score between 0 and 100 indicating the confidence in the review.
